Best Telegram crypto bots for Solana groups

A strong Telegram crypto bot should do more than send links. It should scan tokens, alert groups, open charts, connect to a terminal, and keep trading actions clear.

Open @SlimeWiredBot

Bot checklist

Token scans

CA and ticker scans should surface links, chart access, and risk context.

Group alerts

Communities need clean cards for launches, buys, scans, and activity.

Chart links

Telegram should hand off to a deeper terminal when users need details.

Trading presets

Amount, slippage, TP/SL, and wallet choices should be easy to understand.

Safety language

Bots should avoid guaranteed-profit claims and show risk clearly.

Community tools

Verification, raids, alerts, referrals, and launch support help groups stay active.
